description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines three variables: GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ALPINE set to alpine:3.16.0, GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ANSIBLE set to librespace/ansible:9.13.0, and GITLAB_CI_SIGN_OFF_EXCLUDE set to 560ebadf7353fd458be7bfd2eb08546465cc1e71. Define a single stage named static and add a sign_off job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ALPINE} image, runs a before_script `apk add --no-cache git`, and then executes the git log command `git log --grep "^Signed-off-by: .\+<.\+\(@\| at \).\+\(\.\| dot \).\+>$" --invert-grep --format="Detected commit '%h' with missing or bad sign-off! Please read 'CONTRIBUTING.md'." --exit-code $(rev=$(git rev-parse -q --verify "$GITLAB_CI_SIGN_OFF_EXCLUDE^{commit}") && echo "$rev..")` to detect missing sign‑offs; the job has no dependencies, caches, artifacts or rules. Also add a static_ansible job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ANSIBLE} image and runs the two scripts `ansible-playbook -i production.dist/inventory/hosts --syntax-check -vvv site.yml` and `ansible-lint` for Ansible syntax checking and linting, also in the static stage with no dependencies, caches, artifacts or rules. The pipeline runs these jobs on every pipeline execution.
